en.name: Level 32 — Forest of the Skeleton Queen
en.shortDescription: An endless dark forest of hanging skeletons under a moonless sky, ruled by a skeletal queen who may grant wishes for the price of a soul.
en.atmosphere: Perpetual night lit only by moonlight on bone and bark; haunting winds whisper through the remains — oppressive and sorrowful.
en.tips: Show the Skeleton Queen respect; she may bargain rather than kill. Never chase The Belle unless ready for fatal consequences.
